title: barleria samhanensis
intro: Barleria samhanensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the Samhan Barleria or Barleria samhanensis. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Barleria samhanensis include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, headache, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
